prompt:
STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action, mid-19th-century interiors; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-gray palette; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no illustration or stylized animation

CHARACTER VARIABLES (use these identities consistently; do not redesign faces or wardrobe):
- Character_The_Narrator [The Narrator]: Lean man of middle years (about 40–50), pale sallow skin, hollow cheeks, dark disordered medium-length hair, bright intense dark eyes, thin tense mouth; plain dark wool waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark trousers; period clothing. Visual lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and bright intense dark eyes in every scene; always plain dark waistcoat and shirtsleeves as default; never elderly, never white-haired, never the filmed blue eye. Voice: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

CAST COUNT: exactly 1 distinct on-screen character identity(ies) only — Character_The_Narrator. Do not invent extra people, duplicate faces, or crowd extras not listed.

AUDIO: REQUIRED native Grok off-camera voiceover. Character_The_Narrator narrates exactly: "My head ached, and I fancied a ringing in my ears: but still they sat". Start speaking immediately with "My" — do not skip, delay, or swallow the opening word. After the last word, hold a brief natural pause with a closed mouth (about half a second); do not freeze mid-syllable or trail into empty staring. Do not lip-sync on-screen cast to this VO. Ambient bed: thin ringing. VOICE LOCK Character_The_Narrator: Male, middle years; medium-high tense pitch; precise, controlled pace that sharpens into fevered urgency; intimate confessional energy, same voice on-camera and in V.O.

PREVIOUS CLIP (already provided as video input — continue from its last frame):
INT. OLD MAN'S BEDCHAMBER - NIGHT. A thin ringing enters THE NARRATOR's face. He pales. Touches his temple. OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "But, ere long, I felt myself getting pale and wished them gone.". Character_The_Narrator still wears loose white cotton nightshirt, barefoot Camera directive: Tight close-up holding on paling Narrator wishing them gone, eyes tightening against the sound. Natural progressive motion only — do not invent a new establishing shot or redesign faces/outfits. IDENTITY: Match locked plate descriptions in CHARACTER VARIABLES exactly — do not drift to illustration, anime, cartoon, or a different face/wardrobe. On-screen: Character_The_Narrator.

THIS CLIP:
End cleanly when the spoken line and primary action finish — do not hold a frozen pose or empty silence after dialogue.

OFF-CAMERA VOICEOVER Character_The_Narrator says "My head ached, and I fancied a ringing in my ears: but still they sat". Character_The_Narrator still wears loose white cotton nightshirt, barefoot Camera directive: Extreme detail close-up of Narrator's temple and ear as ringing intensifies inside his head.
